product.title: Cedar Hollow Natural Deodorant
product.description: Small-batch deodorant made in Florida for people who read ingredient labels. Every stick is a one-time purchase, no subscription required, and we never auto-enroll you in anything. Glides on clear, no white marks on dark shirts. If cedar isn't your thing, the Unscented version has zero added fragrance. You won't find aluminum anywhere in our ingredient list. Aluminum never makes it into this formula. We skip the aluminum entirely and rely on arrowroot instead.
